name: Mango Chiffon Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, seed, and slice mangoes.
2. Whirl the mango pieces in a food processor or blender until smooth.
3. Press through a sieve to remove fibers; measure 1-1/2 cups of puree.
4. Dissolve gelatin in sugar with water at a small saucepan over medium heat.
5. Add lime juice and mango puree; refrigerate until the consistency resembles beaten egg whites, about 1 hour.
6. Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form.
7. Gently fold the mango mixture into the egg whites.
8. Whip cream separately, then add vanilla and gently fold into the mango mix.
9. Pour into the prepared pie shell and refrigerate until firm, about 2-3 hours.
10. To serve, top with whipped cream and sliced mango; garnish with fresh mint if desired.
